title: Fictional Celebrity Snapshot
description: A Prompt Atlas theme for photorealistic candid-style images of invented public figures in mundane situations, testing casual camera realism and reasoning composition without real-person likeness.

en.title: Fictional Celebrity Snapshot
en.description: A Prompt Atlas theme for photorealistic candid-style images of invented public figures in mundane situations, testing casual camera realism and reasoning composition without real-person likeness.

zh-CN.title: 名人虚构 snapshot · 伪手机抓拍
zh-CN.description: 用完全虚构的公众人物制造看似随手拍的日常照片，测试手机照片真实感、场景推理和非真实事件构图。
